English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
NAMBLA manuscripts
North American Man/Boy Love Association
7729
.1 cubic feet. .1 cubic feet.
circa 1960-1990. Manuscripts, Printed Materials, Publications Manuscripts submitted for publication to the North American Man-Boy Love Association, together with copies of NAMBLA's constitution. Included are short stories, poetry, and essays. Collection material in English 5450044
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Ezra Corral
Date completed:
July 2008
EAD encoding:
Ezra Corral, July 2008
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, February 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Manuscripts submitted for publication to the North American Man-Boy Love Association, together with copies of NAMBLA's constitution. Included are short stories, poetry, and essays.
RELATED MATERIALS
Collecting program: Human Sexuality Collection.
Cite As:
NAMBLA manuscripts, #7729. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Sodomy. Pedophilia -- Fiction. Pedophilia. North American Man/Boy Love Association
5450044 <<<<<<< HEAD Series I. NAMBLA Journals, Papers, and Related MaterialsTowards a Dialog: "Papers Presented by the North American Man Boy Love Association at the Boston University School of Nursing Conference on 'Child Victimazation'," March 1981. New York: NAMBLA, 1981. 4to, pictorial wrappers, 16 pages. First edition.March 19811Thorstad, David. "Man/Boy Love and Feminism." N.p. [probably New York]: 1980. 4to, stapled sheets, 5 pages. First edition of this "paper ... drafted by David Thorstad as a contribution to a discussion within the North American Man/Boy Love Association."1Angel Talk, Number 1 (July 1989). Oradell, New Jersey: Angel Talk, 1989. First issue of this boy-love periodical, very scarce.1Series II. Leaflets and Flyers published by NAMBLA in New York and Los Angeles"Introducing the North American Man/Boy Love Association." Single sheet folded to make 12 pages, illustrated.19821"Introduction to the North American Man/Boy Love Association With Special Information on the Los Angeles Chapter." Single sheet folded to make 6pages.early 1980s1"NAMBLA-Los Angeles." Small broadside, card stock.early 1980s1"NAMBLA is an Activist Organization." Small broadside, card stock.early 1980s1"Draft Constitution for the North American Man/Boy Love Association." 4to, stapled sheets, 4 pages.early 1980s1The Constitution of the North American Man/Boy Love Association. [New York]: 1983. 4to, single sheet printed on both sides.19831"Boy-Lovers Crash Conference Aimed at Man-Boy Sex." Single Sheet. Press Release.early 1980s1"Who Is This LAPD Detective Lloyd Martin Whom B.U. Honors Tonight?" Legal-size sheet printed on both sides.19811"Dear Friend, Thank You For Writing Us." Single Sheet, illustrated.early 1980s1"NAMBLA...Introduction." Legal-size sheet, illustrated.early 1980s1"All Sex is Not Rape." Single sheet, illustrated.early 1980s1"Fight State Molestation!" Single sheet, illustrated.early 1980s1"Dear Sir:I am a Fourteen Year Old Boy Involved Sexually With An Older Guy I happen to Love Very Much." Two stapled sheets, 4 pages.early 1980s1"An Injury to One is An Injury to All!" Single 4to sheet, illustrated.early 1980s1"Statement by the North American Man/Boy Love Association/ New York City Lesbian and Gay Pride March, June 29, 1980." 4to, single sheet, illustrated by Sydney Smith.early 1980s1"Love Is Not A Crime." 4to, single sheet, illustrated by Sydney Smith.early 1980s1 ======= Series I.
